parts.text:
A premium dark-themed vertical navigation sidebar for GTA VI Vice City dashboard. The sidebar has a dark navy background (#0a0e1a) with glassmorphism effect. At the top, there's a logo section with "GRAND THEFT AUTO" in small uppercase letters (white/70% opacity), below it a large "VI" text in gradient from neon blue to neon purple to neon pink with glowing effect, and "Vice City" in pink neon script font overlaying at an angle.

Below the logo, there are 7 navigation menu items vertically arranged with icons and labels:
1. Home icon (house) - "Home"
2. News icon (newspaper) - "News" 
3. Videos icon (video camera) - "Videos"
4. Events icon (calendar) - "Events"
5. Stats icon (bar chart) - "Stats"
6. Community icon (people group) - "Community"
7. Settings icon (gear) - "Settings"

Each menu item has a clean icon on the left and text label on the right. The active item (Home) has a purple neon glow background and left border accent. Inactive items are gray with subtle hover effects.

At the bottom, there's a user profile section with a circular gradient avatar (purple to pink) and username/email text.

The overall aesthetic is cyberpunk, futuristic, with neon accents, smooth gradients, and a premium dark theme. High quality, modern UI design, 4K resolution.
